idea-plugin.name: You Regex Interpreter
idea-plugin.description:
You Regex Interpreter is an IntelliJ IDEA plugin that helps developers understand, debug, and test regular expressions instantly within the IDE.

Features:

  • Natural language explanation of regex patterns
  • Real-time match testing with highlighting
  • Syntax error detection and position marking
  • Structured regex visualization
  • 30+ built-in regex templates

action.description: Open the Regex Interpreter tool window
